sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
Strength meets serenity in our handcrafted Bear & Baby Bear Miniature, embedded with natural Green Aventurine crystal chips. Representing courage, protection, and nurturing love, this adorable duo captures the essence of nature’s guardians — grounding your space with calm, confident energy.

Green Aventurine, known as the Crystal of Opportunity, invites prosperity, balance, and emotional renewal, while the bear symbolizes resilience and family bonding. Together, they create a perfect harmony of strength and serenity — a reminder to stay rooted while embracing growth.

Size: Bear- 4.5 × 3.6 cm (Height × Width)
Baby Bear- 2.4 × 1.6 cm
Weight in Gms- 262.6

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
🐻 Bear: Symbol of courage, grounding & inner strength

🐻 Baby Bear: Represents warmth, love & protection

💚 Green Aventurine: Attracts prosperity, positivity & emotional balance

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text: It is carefully handcrafted by skilled artisans, setting each natural aventurine crystal into a polished metal frame. Every piece is shaped and finished with precision to ensure lasting beauty and spiritual energy.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Place this set in your living room, workspace, or meditation corner to attract positive vibrations and prosperity. It also makes a thoughtful gift for housewarmings, new ventures, or loved ones seeking growth and balance.
